name: Gold Tone Multi-Heart Lariat Y-Necklace
description: Add a romantic and modern touch to your neckline with this elegant gold-tone Y-necklace. Featuring a delicate chain accented with multiple polished, puffed heart charms and a graceful 4.5cm drop, this anti-tarnish piece offers a stunning, long-lasting shine perfect for layering or wearing solo.

media.alt_text: Gold tone lariat Y-necklace featuring polished puffed heart charms and dimensional sizing details

faqs.question: What is the length of this necklace?
faqs.answer: The necklace features a 42cm chain with a 6cm adjustable extender, allowing for a comfortable and customizable fit. The central drop measures 4.5cm.

faqs.question: Are the heart charms large?
faqs.answer: No, the heart charms are delicately sized at 1cm wide, offering a subtle and elegant look.

faqs.question: Will this necklace lose its gold tone?
faqs.answer: This necklace is crafted with a high-quality anti-tarnish finish designed to resist fading and maintain its radiant golden shine with regular use.

meta_description: Shop the elegant Gold Tone Multi-Heart Lariat Y-Necklace. Featuring delicate puffed heart charms, an adjustable chain, and an anti-tarnish finish.
